summary: Adjusted the packet-discovery sequence to align with the boundary context and tightened the closing beat so the overnight handoff into chapter 10 lands more cleanly.
edits: Changed Mohit's packet-delivery destination from Harbor C to Ballroom C.
Moved the deck opening and photo-documentation beat into the fluorescent hallway outside Ballroom C to match the adjacent chapter's remembered location.
Sharpened the final sentence so the room's cold, shallow sleep leads directly into the next chapter.
